notes: GitLab.com sign-in page. Clean layout with username/password form, 'Forgot your password?' link, Remember me checkbox, SSO provider buttons (Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, Salesforce), and Register tab. Replaces outlook-login (bot-protected).

endpoints.label: Login Form
endpoints.description: Username or email + password login form with Sign in submit button and Forgot Password link

endpoints.label: SSO Providers
endpoints.description: Sign in with Google, GitHub, Bitbucket, and Salesforce OAuth buttons

endpoints.label: Account Links
endpoints.description: Register for new account and Explore public projects links
